Hero.name: Gervásio Cardoso
Hero.description: I build modern interfaces and robust applications with a focus on performance, DX, and user experience. Real projects, clean code, and fast delivery.

About.name: Gervásio Cardoso
About.title: Who I am and how I work
About.subtitle: A quick overview of my developer profile, technical focus, and the kind of product I enjoy building.
About.p1: I develop applications focused on user experience, performance, and sustainable code. I enjoy taking a real problem and turning it into a product with a modern interface and robust backend.
About.p2: I work from front to back: building screens, organizing components, integrating APIs, modeling databases, and ensuring well-defined deliveries.

deliver.title: What I deliver
deliver.text: Responsive interfaces, solid integrations, and clear dashboards.

seek.title: What I seek
seek.text: Real projects, well-thought-out products, and measurable impact.

Education.title: Academic Background
Education.subtitle: My academic and technical foundation that supports my work as a developer.

uesb.description: Emphasis on software development, data structures, databases, and systems architecture.

Experience.title: Professional Experience
Experience.subtitle: A summary of what I've built and how I operate day-to-day, from product to delivery.

highlights: Development and maintenance of a complex and scalable digital ecosystem at Grupo Fellow.
Creation of accessible interfaces focused on high performance and conversion rates.
Building optimized checkout screens and analytical dashboards using Next.js and React.
Integration of interfaces with .NET/C# microservices for transaction processing and payment splits.
Implementation of SSR and SSG to ensure instant loading in high-traffic scenarios.
Development of custom ERPs and Stand-alone systems for companies.
Creation of business management solutions with database integration and interactive dashboards.
Implementation of dashboards and critical flows focused on UX and metrics.
System optimization to ensure better performance and usability.
Creation of websites and landing pages for companies and professionals, focusing on responsiveness and SEO best practices.
Developed and maintained responsive web applications using React.js, Next.js, and TypeScript, ensuring scalability.
Worked on the backend with Node.js, Prisma, and Postman for API integration.
Implemented a real-time chat via WebSocket with support for sending images and files.
Optimized system performance, reducing redundancies with reusable components.
Implementation of dashboards and critical flows focused on UX and metrics.

Stacks.title: Technologies I use
Stacks.subtitle: Tools and technologies that are part of my daily development workflow.

Projects.title: Featured Projects
Projects.subtitle: A selection of what I've been building — focus on product, performance, and user experience.

items.pousada: Dashboard for managing reservations, consumption, and inventory. Focus on UX, performance, and operational flow.
items.admin_jg: Management Dashboard for clients, suppliers, sales, expenses, documents, and stock. Focus on UX, performance, and operational flow.
items.intranet: Platform for employees to receive company files, news, and direct chat support.
items.mbv: Web platform designed to help clients choose the most suitable ophthalmic lens based on visual habits and medical prescription.
items.blog: Company news portal for announcements of new franchisees, promotions, and advertising campaigns.
items.psicologa: Clearly presents the professional's skills, services, and educational background for clients.
items.movies: Film catalog explorer using a public API with an intuitive interface and attractive visual design.
items.links: Customized Quick Links page (Bio Link) developed for the Lane Castro brand. This project focuses on accessibility and performance, seamlessly connecting the audience to sales channels and customer support.
items.links_casa_jardine: Customized quick links interface for Casa Jardine, connecting customers to key support, sales, and social channels.
items.casa_jardine: Institutional website for Casa Jardine focused on brand presentation, visual experience, and quick access to main contact points.
items.gestao_casa_jardine: Management system for Casa Jardine focused on operational control, event organization, and tracking essential information.
